# IDC Workflow

> IDC (Iterative Development Cycle) is a guardrail-framed, tracker-driven, goal-contract
> development pipeline packaged as a Claude Code plugin. The flow is Think → Plan → Build,
> with the Recirculator healing drift and Autorun draining the whole pipe. It is built on five
> guardrails — the one PRD gate, matrix deconfliction, real verification surfaces, recirculator,
> and one-way flow through the glass wall (tracker issues) — and trusts the model with
> everything else. This index lists every command, agent, skill, template, script, and
> contract with a one-line purpose. Names are plugin-namespaced (`idc:`); files reference
> each other via `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}`.

## Commands

Slash entry points (`commands/<name>.md` → `/idc:<name>`).

- commands/think.md — `/idc:think`: free-form brainstorm (zero teammates) → one function-first consideration.
- commands/plan.md — `/idc:plan`: consideration → goal-contract issues (domain experts, five-layer doc chain, matrix deconfliction, board admission, one PRD gate).
- commands/build.md — `/idc:build`: execute each issue's goal contract as a goal loop; merged review engine per PR; automerge on PASS.
- commands/recirculate.md — `/idc:recirculate`: heal doc/reality drift in one PR (PR body = change order); PRD changes take the gate.
- commands/autorun.md — `/idc:autorun`: one-shot full-pipe drainer; loopable via `/loop`.
- commands/init.md — `/idc:init`: scaffold a repo for IDC v2 (config + codebase-derived domains + 4-field board + install receipt); idempotent.
- commands/doctor.md — `/idc:doctor`: read-only health check of an IDC-governed repo.
- commands/update.md — `/idc:update`: resync a repo's stamped scaffold to the installed plugin (receipt-driven; pristine files silently re-stamped, customized files diff-and-asked; board report-only, never mutated).
- commands/uninstall.md — `/idc:uninstall`: remove IDC repo footprints in one revertable commit (receipt-driven removal manifest + hardcoded pre-receipt fallback; work products archived; GitHub untouched by default).

## Agents

Per-stage orchestrator playbooks + the one durable-worker role + the review coordinator.

- agents/idc-plan.md — Plan orchestrator: consideration → goal-contract issues in one zero-teammate run.
- agents/idc-build.md — Build orchestrator + finisher/merge-queue: claim waves, dispatch implementers, review, automerge + close.
- agents/idc-implementer.md — the one durable worker: executes a single issue's goal contract as a goal loop (failing-test-first, record-and-vary, no-punt).
- agents/idc-review-coordinator.md — merged review engine coordinator: fan out specialists, dedup/score, emit the fail-closed verdict.
- agents/idc-recirculator.md — Recirculator orchestrator: highest-affected-layer doc-sync in one PR; PRD-only gate.
- agents/idc-autorun.md — Autorun two-lane drainer: plan unplanned considerations (serialized admission) + build eligible waves; exit on drain-complete.

## Skills

Reusable procedures (`skills/<name>/SKILL.md`).

- skills/idc-adapter-claude/ — Claude runtime adapter: primitives → Claude mechanics (Teams / Workflow / Task / goal) + model-tier resolution.
- skills/idc-adapter-codex/ — Codex runtime adapter: primitives → Codex mechanics (app-server threads / spawn_agent / exec fan-out); untiered.
- skills/idc-tracker-adapter/ — route tracker ops through the configured backend (dispatch surface; hides github⇄filesystem).
- skills/idc-tracker-github/ — GitHub Projects v2 backend (six ops over the 4 fields, native blocked-by, claim comments, attempt label).
- skills/idc-tracker-filesystem/ — filesystem backend (`TRACKER.md`); documents the executable helper scripts/idc_tracker_fs.py.
- skills/idc-gate-issue/ — the one PRD gate: gate issue + chained blocked-by + push notification + approval/unblock.
- skills/idc-consideration-schema/ — the function-first, Plan-ready consideration shape + its mechanical check.
- skills/idc-goal-contract/ — the 6-element goal-contract authoring shape (Plan authors, Build executes).
- skills/idc-matrix-analysis/ — pairwise clash fan-out, phase-matrix synthesis, parallel-safe wave re-sequencing.
- skills/idc-schema-check/ — the mechanical issue-body gate (full contract + boundaries + deps + trace).
- skills/idc-review-engine/ — the merged 13-dimension review engine (fan-out + dedup + confidence floor + fail-closed verdicts + test genuineness).
- skills/idc-recirculator-sync/ — highest-affected-layer + downstream sync set + the binary gate decision.

## Templates

Per-project scaffold copied by `/idc:init` (tokens: `{{PROJECT_NAME}}`, `{{TRACKER_PROJECT_NUMBER}}`).

- templates/WORKFLOW.md — the per-repo IDC governance contract (five guardrails, three primitives, 4-field tracker, tier routing). → repo root.
- templates/WORKFLOW-config.yaml — contract sidecar: project name, codebase-derived domains, tier-symbolic model_routing. → repo root.
- templates/tracker-config.yaml — tracker backend + the four field IDs (Status/Wave/Phase/Domain). → `docs/workflow/tracker-config.yaml`.
- templates/docs-tree/ — the lean `docs/workflow/` tree (pillar-matrices/, code-reviews/ + README). → `docs/workflow/`.
- templates/README.md — token reference and `/idc:init` destination map.

## Scripts

- scripts/lint-references.sh — reference-integrity linter (namespacing, path/frontmatter integrity, no personal paths, no dangling refs).
- scripts/idc_tracker_fs.py — the filesystem tracker backend (six ops + claim/block/close over `TRACKER.md`).
- scripts/idc_init_scaffold.sh — deterministic, idempotent filesystem scaffold core used by `/idc:init`.
- scripts/idc_settings_json.py — safe `.claude/settings.json` enable/disable helper (preserve operator keys; atomic write).
- scripts/idc_receipt_check.py — install-receipt substrate: `stamp` (emit the SHA-256 manifest) + `verify` (classify stamped files unchanged/modified/missing; fail-loud on a missing/invalid receipt); the safety-critical compare `/idc:update` and `/idc:uninstall` consume.
- scripts/idc_consideration_check.py — validate a consideration is function-first and Plan-ready.
- scripts/idc_schema_check.py — validate an issue body is a complete goal contract.
- scripts/idc_matrix_check.py — matrix deconfliction (same-wave pillars must own disjoint surfaces).
- scripts/idc_review_verdict_check.py — validate a review verdict's structure + taxonomy consistency.
- scripts/idc_recirculator_layers.py — recirculator downstream sync set + gate decision over the doc chain.
- scripts/idc_autorun_drain.py — autorun's drain predicate (eligible build work vs PRD-gated/operator-only).
- scripts/install-codex.sh — link the plugin skills (incl. the Codex adapter) into `~/.agents/skills`; `--revert` undoes it.
- scripts/run-evals.sh — legacy eval runner; v2 verification is the tests/smoke/ suite.
- scripts/materialize-sandbox.sh — create a disposable IDC-governed sandbox repo.

## Tests & contracts

- tests/smoke/run-all.sh — the v2 functional verification suite (per-phase real round-trips against a throwaway sandbox).
- .claude-plugin/plugin.json — plugin manifest (`name: idc`, version 2.0.0).
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json — self-hosted marketplace listing the `idc` plugin.
- docs/prd/prd.md — the v2 product requirements.
- docs/specs/master-architectural-spec.md — the v2 plugin architecture + naming convention + inventory invariants.
- docs/architecture.md — role flow, the five guardrails, the tracker contract, command/agent/skill composition.
- docs/installing.md — machine, project, and Codex install flows + `/idc:doctor` troubleshooting.
